ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing the feedback */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being evaluated */,
  "price_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the vehicle's price (1-5 scale) */,
  "safety_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the vehicle's safety (1-5 scale) */,
  "exterior_looks_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the vehicle's exterior looks (1-5 scale) */,
  "space_comfort_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the vehicle's space and comfort (1-5 scale) */,
  "technology_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the vehicle's technology (1-5 scale) */,
  "after_sales_service_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the vehicle's after-sales service (1-5 scale) */,
  "resale_value_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the vehicle's resale value (1-5 scale) */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fuel type */,
  "fuel_efficiency_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the vehicle's fuel efficiency (1-5 scale) */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle color */,
  "maintenance_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the vehicle maintenance (1-5 scale) */,
  "test_drive_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the test drive experience (1-5 scale) */,
  "product_reviews_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the product reviews (1-5 scale) */,
  "testimonials" TEXT /* Text of the customer's testimonial */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_version" INTEGER /* Version number for the feedback to track changes over time */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the feedback was provided */,
  "customer_satisfaction_score" INTEGER /* Overall satisfaction score (1-5 scale) */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feedback is anonymous */,
  "source_of_feedback" TEXT /* Source of the feedback (e.g., website, dealership, phone call) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Customer's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Customer's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer's email address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Customer's age */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Customer's gender */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Customer's occupation */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "annual_income" INTEGER /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "number_of_vehicles_owned" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles the customer owns */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., email, phone, text) */,
  "is_subscribed_to_newsletter" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the customer is subscribed to the company's newsletter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model name of the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "trim_level" TEXT /* Trim level of the vehicle */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Transmission type of the vehicle */,
  "drivetrain" TEXT /* Drivetrain type of the vehicle */,
  "engine_size" REAL /* Size of the engine in liters */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the vehicle */,
  "torque" INTEGER /* Torque of the vehicle in Nm */,
  "fuel_tank_capacity" REAL /* Fuel tank capacity in liters */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the vehicle */,
  "fuel_consumption_city" REAL /* Fuel consumption in the city (km/L) */,
  "fuel_consumption_highway" REAL /* Fuel consumption on the highway (km/L) */,
  "vehicle_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the vehicle in kg */,
  "emission_standard" TEXT /* Emission standard of the vehicle */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period in months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fuel type */,
  "octane_rating" INTEGER /* Octane rating for petrol */,
  "cetane_number" INTEGER /* Cetane number for diesel */,
  "electric_battery_capacity" REAL /* Battery capacity for electric vehicles (kWh) */,
  "charging_time" REAL /* Charging time for electric vehicles (hours) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hex code of the color */,
  "color_type" TEXT /* Type of color (e.g., metallic, pearl, solid) */,
  "additional_cost" REAL /* Additional cost for the color option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the region is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the region is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income in the region */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate type of the region (e.g., tropical, temperate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_region" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer joined the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "can_edit_feedback" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role can edit customer feedback */,
  "can_view_reports" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role can view reports */,
  "can_manage_users" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role can manage user accounts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date of the last password change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
